The '''Zantay Hills''' were a stretch of hills on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. They were east of the [[Kibo Geothermal Station]] and [[Kibo Lake]], 180 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] east of the [[Dashta Mountains]], and to the south of [[Yal-Noy]]. They were near the [[Zantay Caves]].

A [[river]] fed by Yal-Noy's [[Water/Legends|snowmelt]] ran through the Hills, which allowed for more [[Plant/Legends|plants]] to grow in the area than most of Cestus' sparse landscape.

[[Sheeka Tull]] and her family lived in the Hills.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
